data.name: Learning Humanoid Arm Motion via Centroidal Momentum Regularized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning

data.description: Learning Humanoid Arm Motion via Centroidal Momentum Regularized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning uses Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
Learning Humanoid Arm Motion via Centroidal Momentum Regularized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning proposes Whole-Body Control (WBC).
Learning Humanoid Arm Motion via Centroidal Momentum Regularized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning discusses Capture Point.
